plugin.name: push
plugin.description: Push notifications: FCM, WebPush, device registration

conventions.name: send_fcm
conventions.description: Send push notification via Firebase Cloud Messaging HTTP v1 API

conventions.name: send_webpush
conventions.description: Send push notification via Web Push protocol (VAPID)

conventions.name: register_device
conventions.description: Register a device token for push notifications

conventions.name: unregister_device
conventions.description: Unregister a device from push notifications
